title: bursera simplex
intro: Bursera simplex, also known as the "tangalo", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bursera simplex include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat skin conditions, such as acne and dermatitis.
